item.title: From super typhoons to record cold: Pacific faces extreme weather A storm batters the Marianas, Tonga records its coldest temperature ever and PNG communities worry after frost destroys food gardens.
item.description: A storm batters the Marianas, Tonga records its coldest temperature ever and PNG communities worry after frost destroys food gardens.

item.title: Fiji, Sāmoa and Tonga name squads for new rugby tournaments Pacific teams are set to test themselves against top-tier opposition across three continents.
item.description: Pacific teams are set to test themselves against top-tier opposition across three continents.

item.title: Pacific filmmakers earn a seat at the Academy Awards voting table A Tongan-New Zealand film-maker and Sāmoan director have been invited to join the Academy behind the Oscars.
item.description: A Tongan-New Zealand film-maker and Sāmoan director have been invited to join the Academy behind the Oscars.

item.title: Local Democracy Reporting
item.description: Residents are being encouraged to have their say on draft Local Board Plans, despite what one local board chair describes as "consultation fatigue".
item.content:encoded: Residents are being encouraged to have their say on draft Local Board Plans, despite what one local board chair describes as "consultation fatigue".

item.title: Savea named captain as Pacific duo break into All Blacks squad Ardie Savea heads a strong Pasifika contingent with Hurricanes' stars Xavier Numia and Fehi Fineanganofo among four new faces in the NZ side.
item.description: Ardie Savea heads a strong Pasifika contingent with Hurricanes' stars Xavier Numia and Fehi Fineanganofo among four new faces in the NZ side.

item.title: Aotearoa New Zealand
item.description: Green Party Co-leader Marama Davidson says protecting Aotearoa New Zealand’s waterways and oceans is about more than environmental rules.
item.content:encoded: Green Party Co-leader Marama Davidson says protecting Aotearoa New Zealand’s waterways and oceans is about more than environmental rules.

item.title: Cook Islands set up Papua New Guinea showdown after historic Tonga win The hosts are one win away from qualification after a commanding 4-0 victory over Tonga at the 2026 OFC U19 Men's Championship in Rarotonga.
item.description: The hosts are one win away from qualification after a commanding 4-0 victory over Tonga at the 2026 OFC U19 Men's Championship in Rarotonga.

item.title: Tonga Election Scandal: third cabinet minister found guilty of bribery The government is under pressure as Dr Taniela Fusimalohi is convicted of election bribery amid possible byelections and a wider cabinet shakeup.
item.description: The government is under pressure as Dr Taniela Fusimalohi is convicted of election bribery amid possible byelections and a wider cabinet shakeup.
